canonical_work.title: DJ Shadow — Six Days (dir. Wong Kar-wai, DOP Christopher Doyle, 2002)

limitations: A single canonical work is a work signature, not a director-wide frequency claim.
ASL remains detector-consensus inferred until the frozen boundary benchmark exists.
Framing is axis-rescued inferred evidence: 93.2% of shots and 89.816% of represented duration are resolved.
Ten abstract or illegible shots remain unclassified and are preserved in the uncertainty envelope.
Zero POV/aerial observations do not prove those devices are absent from the director's broader work.
